name: requests
description: Google-Docs-style access request workflow. When a User hits a resource they lack permissions for, the middleware layer returns 403 with a `request_url`; the SPA renders a `Request access` affordance. Clicking it POSTs to `/access-requests` which creates an `approval_instance` under the hood via `workflow/approvals` with `subject_type='access_request'` and `action_key='access.grants.create'`. Once the approvers approve, an `ApprovalExecutedListener` bridges to `access/grants::GrantIssuer` and materialises the entitlement row — full circle. This module is DELIBERATELY THIN: it holds NO state of its own (the request state lives in `workflow/approvals.approval_instances` rows and the resulting grant lives in `access/grants.access_grants`). It ships the HTTP surface, the CreateAccessRequestAction (marked `#[AsApprovableAction('access.grants.create')]`), the listener bridge to `access/grants`, the 403-response enrichment middleware, and the AccessRequest DTO abstraction over the underlying approval instance. Every access request is tenant-scoped — never cross-tenant — a User can only request access to resources in tenants they're already a member of via TenantMember.

flow.description: This module IS a bridge — documenting the cross-module event chain here rather than in a dedicated flow.json file (§10 of readme.md traces it in detail).
chain: access.request_hint_on_denial middleware → enriches 403 body with request_url
workflow/approvals → creates approval_instance + requirements + resolves approvers
AccessRequestSubmitted event fires (this module's shim event on top of ApprovalRequested)
NotifyApproversJob → delivers AccessRequestSubmittedNotification to each approver
workflow/approvals → records decision → fires ApprovalExecuted when quorum satisfied
access/grants → creates access_grants row with source='access_request'

tenant.description: Tenant-facing access-request CRUD. Requesters submit + track their own requests; approvers review + decide.

platform-admin.description: Cross-tenant read + compliance report for Academorix staff. Never mutates — approve/reject flow the tenant plane.
